pairs.key: Frontal (agranular frontal motor areas)||Lateral Prefrontal Cortex
Frontal (agranular frontal motor areas)||Parietal, and Parieto-occipital region
Lateral Prefrontal Cortex||Parietal, and Parieto-occipital region

validation.validation_design: retrospective full strict LOSO with fold-local high-confusion pair discovery and pair-specific correlation
validation.decision: `network_pairwise_correlation_rescue_top3` 在本轮回顾性全量严格 LOSO 中同时提高 Top1 且未降低 Top3，可进入独立队列确认；独立确认前不替换正式 Top200 路径。

notes: Pairwise rescue is applied only within the baseline Top3 Network beam. It may switch Top1 but does not change the Top3 candidate set.
